evals.prompt: B2B SaaS dashboard rendering and state strategy

with_skill.notes: Comprehensive ADR-driven architecture with explicit trade-offs, performance budgets, and complete implementation patterns. Clear boundaries, detailed rationale, and upgrade paths.

without_skill.notes: Strong hybrid architecture with good implementation details and code examples. Missing explicit trade-off consequences and detailed discussion of rendering strategy trade-offs.

evals.prompt: Slow Next.js app performance review (Lighthouse 45, 1.2MB bundle)

with_skill.notes: Comprehensive review with detailed architecture health scoring, explicit effort estimates for each finding, specific bundle reduction strategies, before/after code patterns, phased migration plan with weekly targets.

without_skill.notes: Strong foundational analysis with clear problem diagnosis, code splitting examples, Core Web Vitals coverage, and phased roadmap. Missing specific image optimization strategies and granular effort estimates.
